{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/45733294?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pawbednarz", "id": 45733294, "login": "pawbednarz", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ1NzMzMjk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pawbednarz", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42233", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "## Impact
A flaw in the Oracle Database node's select operation allowed user-controlled input passed into the `Limit` field via expressions to be interpolated directly into the SQL query without sanitization or parameterization. In workflows where external input is passed into the `Limit` field (e.g., from a webhook), an attacker could inject arbitrary SQL and exfiltrate data from the connected Oracle database.

Exploitation requires a specific workflow configuration:
- The Oracle Database node must be used with user-controlled input passed via expressions into the `Limit` field.
- Authentication requirements depend on the workflow's configuration (e.g., an unauthenticated webhook endpoint would allow unauthenticated exploitation).

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.32, 2.17.4, and 2.18.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Limit workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Disable the Oracle Database node by adding `n8n-nodes-base.oracleDatabase` to the `NODES_EXCLUDE` environment variable.
- Avoid passing unvalidated external user input into the Oracle Database node's `Limit` field via expressions.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00327, "percentile": 0.24528}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T21:08:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42233"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T19:16:05Z", "published_at": "2026-04-29T21:08:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42233", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n has SQL Injection in Oracle Database Node via Limit Field", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:30:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r6jc-mpqw-m755", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.32", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.32"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.18.0, < 2.18.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.17.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 2.17.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n has SQL Injection in Oracle Database Node via Limit Field
